Manages app glance services and defines related data structures and functions for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[app_glance_service.c](app_glance_service.c.md)**: Manages app glance services, including event handling and current slice retrieval for Pebble firmware.
- **[app_glance_service.h](app_glance_service.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing app glances, including initialization and retrieval.
